name: C-19 compliance auto-refresh emits a start message to stderr with the timestamp for traceability
command: printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --upstream-stub ./up.sh 2>err.txt && grep -q 'compliance auto-refresh started at 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z' err.txt && echo started 1>&2
